## Type of change

- [ ] New article or article revision
- [ ] Widget or interactive component
- [ ] Animation or visual asset
- [ ] Site, tooling, or infrastructure
- [ ] Docs

## For content PRs

- [ ] `pnpm validate:content` passes
- [ ] I checked the page in the preview deployment
- [ ] Frontmatter declares prerequisites and partOf where they exist
- [ ] I can explain and defend every claim in this article
